title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 8.525
text:
*8.525.  No personal liability for board members, when. — Members of the board and persons acting on the authority's behalf, while acting within the scope of their employment or agency, are not subject to personal liability resulting from carrying out the powers and duties conferred on them under sections 8.500 to 8.565.
(L. 2002 S.B. 1191) 
Effective 6-07-02 
*Section terminates upon satisfaction of all outstanding notes and obligations.  See section 8.589.
